title: Payer-side state machine
description: States: Requested (sent PaymentAction::Request, waiting for Address) → Addressed (received address, building tx) → Sent (broadcast tx, waiting for Confirmed) → Complete. On each state transition: persist state, send appropriate PaymentAction message via the chat broadcast path. Handle unexpected messages gracefully (warn + ignore).
close_reason: Fully implemented by nie-6sp, nie-c20, nie-c1v respectively
